TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kaliliman == kasadingsingan, pisiwgacean nu malukay a kuyumi, Cowng-kow a pisiwgacean, layak a pisiwgac, u kuyumi nu Cowng-kow "malukay a kuyumi" pisiwgacean, uyza Huwa a tademaw atu kitakit layak a cudad a lalangawan cacay a mihcaan u satabakiay lalay a lisin a demiad. . makay mintay a malingatu, Hwa-siya kalimulakan nu pisiwgac zuma akatukuh cacay a bulad sabaw lima a demiad yen-syaw zikuz kya malepun ku kawawa, zuma izaw ku milimulakay tu pisiwngacean tuwaca katukuh hamin nu cacay a bulad pahezek, milimulak a kawaw siwgac han ku ngangan, u misiwgac. ,Śļ¶ś≠≤Á≠Č. zikuz nu sin-hay-ke-min, cen-bu mikilu tu ziday a tatungus u malumanay a kuyum sumad han tu ke-li kuyumi. Hwa-sya a misiwgac atu Caw-syen a siwgac,Ye-na a siwgac, Liw-ciw a siwgac atua ayaw nu Min-ce-wi a siwgac Lipun a siwgac hatu malecad ku demiad, lisin nu Cang a kuyumi, Mung-ku a siwgac malecad ku demiad anca cacay a demiad anca cacay a bulad ku laed. u siwgac nu Cow-kow. skaadingsingan i 2023 a mihcaan mala makakadumay a kanatal a pihibangan a demiad, i 2024 a mihcaan "sadingsingan a lisin nu Cowng-kow u kalimulakan a lisin nu syakay" caay ku tungus nu nisubelidan a lalangawan a tuud nu tademaw. pakayni malumanay kuyumin siwgace uyni ku nipili' a pangangan yadah ku kamu a macaculi. Namakay 2010 a zidayan malingtu, zima a binawlan nu Amilika "micidek ku Han-i atu Ye-nan-i" micili i katuudy nu cen-bu micukaymas tu ngangan nu Cowng-kow a siwgac. zuma Amilika a cen-ce-cya pasayza micukaymas tu "Lunar New Year". ayza a mihcaan Taywan micukaymas tu "Lunar New Year" apakutay han tu "Chinese New Year", mahiniay a nipatahkal makaynah nu Cowng-kow-talu a sinsinbunan "namalilid nu Cowng-kow". namahiza sa ku kamu nu cen-bu nu Cowng-kow-talu zuma micukaymas tu mahiniay a "Lunar New Year". "Lunar New Year"šĺÜšĽ£śõŅ"Chinese New Year" "Lunar New Year"ÁöĄŤ™™ś≥ē. nakamuan a lalangawan ŤĶ∑śļźŚā≥Ť™™ siwgace a lisin namaycuwaay hakya caay tu kadayum a gingkiwan, nika hinisa ku zima lalekalan sa iing-sang a mihcaan sazikuzay nu mihcaan misalisin tu Di'tu, misalisin tu tuas a kawaw "misalisin tu piadup", nakamuan saayaway i yaw-sun izaw tu ku lisin nu sadingsingan a lisin. malukay a kuyum cacay a bulad malingatu tu cacay a mihcaan, cacay a bulad tu cacay a demiad palalecad i capi nu kasadingsingan. lisin a demiad tatenga' atu pakayniay malukay malilid ku kawaw, "al-ya a nikiluan, "tang-i-ye-cay, sya-ye-suy, sang-yeci, cow-ye-nyen." musakamu tu "mihca" a ngangan makay cow a ziday malingatu, cya-ku-wen atu cin-wenay a mihca a cudad mazuhemay a tipus sanay. "musakamu pasubana' tu cudad" ngangan "mkihca, masuhem ku tipus. makay masuhem ku tipus. yadah ku nilangec." malukay a kuyumi nu cacay a mihcaan tu zazikuzay a demiad "sabaw tusa a bulan tabakiay a bulad tu 30 a demiad, adidi'ay a bulad 29 a demiad", "cu-si han" cu-si a labii mapulung amin ku luma'ay malabi tu siwgac "malumanay a kuyumi cacay a mihcaan tu sazikuzay a pukan",kalabian tu mihca anuayaw izaw ku nipakilac tu kalisiw atu misalabii "mupupu tu mihcaan" a lisin, tungusay makay ayaway a mihca tu sazikuzay a demiad mipupu katukuh tu zuma a mihca tu sakacacay a demiad. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kar~…ĺir~…ĺiman == kasadiŇčsiŇčan, pisiwga ¶…ôan nu mar~…ĺukaj a kujumi, ¶owŇč-kow a pisiwga ¶…ôan, r~…ĺajak a pisiwga ¶, u kujumi nu ¶owŇč-kow "mar~…ĺukaj a kujumi" pisiwga ¶…ôan, ujza ńßuwa a tad…ômaw atu kitakit r~…ĺajak a ¶udad a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan u satabakiaj r~…ĺar~…ĺaj a r~…ĺisin a d…ômiad. . makaj mintaj a mar~…ĺiŇčatu, ńßwa-sija kar~…ĺimur~…ĺakan nu pisiwga ¶ zuma akatukuńß ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad sabaw r~…ĺima a d…ômiad j…ôn-sjaw zikuz kja mar~…ĺ…ôpun ku kawawa, zuma izaw ku mir~…ĺimur~…ĺakaj tu pisiwŇča ¶…ôan tuwa ¶a katukuńß ńßamin nu ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad pańß…ôz…ôk, mir~…ĺimur~…ĺak a kawaw siwga ¶ ńßan ku ŇčaŇčan, u misiwga ¶. ,***. zikuz nu sin-ńßaj-k…ô-min, ¶…ôn-bu mikir~…ĺu tu zidaj a tatuŇčus u mar~…ĺumanaj a kujum sumad ńßan tu k…ô-r~…ĺi kujumi. ńßwa-sja a misiwga ¶ atu ¶aw-sj…ôn a siwga ¶,j…ô-na a siwga ¶, r~…ĺiw- ¶iw a siwga ¶ atua ajaw nu min- ¶…ô-wi a siwga ¶ r~…ĺipun a siwga ¶ ńßatu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku d…ômiad, r~…ĺisin nu ¶aŇč a kujumi, muŇč-ku a siwga ¶ mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku d…ômiad an ¶a ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad an ¶a ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad ku r~…ĺa…ôd. u siwga ¶ nu ¶ow-kow. skaadiŇčsiŇčan i **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa makakadumaj a kanatar~…ĺ a pińßibaŇčan a d…ômiad, i **** a mińß ¶aan "sadiŇčsiŇčan a r~…ĺisin nu ¶owŇč-kow u kar~…ĺimur~…ĺakan a r~…ĺisin nu sjakaj" ¶aaj ku tuŇčus nu nisub…ôr~…ĺidan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a tuud nu tad…ômaw. pakajni mar~…ĺumanaj kujumin siwga ¶…ô ujni ku nipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° a paŇčaŇčan jadańß ku kamu a ma ¶a ¶ur~…ĺi. namakaj **** a zidajan mar~…ĺiŇčtu, zima a binawr~…ĺan nu amir~…ĺika "mi ¶id…ôk ku ńßan-i atu j…ô-nan-i" mi ¶ir~…ĺi i katuudj nu ¶…ôn-bu mi ¶ukajmas tu ŇčaŇčan nu ¶owŇč-kow a siwga ¶. zuma amir~…ĺika a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô- ¶ja pasajza mi ¶ukajmas tu "r~…ĺunar n…ôw j…ôar". ajza a mińß ¶aan tajwan mi ¶ukajmas tu "r~…ĺunar n…ôw j…ôar" apakutaj ńßan tu " ¶ńßin…ôs…ô n…ôw j…ôar", mańßiniaj a nipatańßkar~…ĺ makajnańß nu ¶owŇč-kow-tar~…ĺu a sinsinbunan "namar~…ĺir~…ĺid nu ¶owŇč-kow". namańßiza sa ku kamu nu ¶…ôn-bu nu ¶owŇč-kow-tar~…ĺu zuma mi ¶ukajmas tu mańßiniaj a "r~…ĺunar n…ôw j…ôar". "r~…ĺunar n…ôw j…ôar"***" ¶ńßin…ôs…ô n…ôw j…ôar" "r~…ĺunar n…ôw j…ôar"***. nakamuan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan **** siwga ¶…ô a r~…ĺisin namaj ¶uwaaj ńßakja ¶aaj tu kadajum a giŇčkiwan, nika ńßinisa ku zima r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan sa iiŇč-saŇč a mińß ¶aan sazikuzaj nu mińß ¶aan misar~…ĺisin tu di Ē~ °tu, misar~…ĺisin tu tuas a kawaw "misar~…ĺisin tu piadup", nakamuan saajawaj i jaw-sun izaw tu ku r~…ĺisin nu sadiŇčsiŇčan a r~…ĺisin. mar~…ĺukaj a kujum ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan, ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad tu ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad i ¶api nu kasadiŇčsiŇčan. r~…ĺisin a d…ômiad tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° atu pakajniaj mar~…ĺukaj mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ku kawaw, "ar~…ĺ-ja a nikir~…ĺuan, "taŇč-i-j…ô- ¶aj, sja-j…ô-suj, saŇč-j…ô ¶i, ¶ow-j…ô-nj…ôn." musakamu tu "mińß ¶a" a ŇčaŇčan makaj ¶ow a zidaj mar~…ĺiŇčatu, ¶ja-ku-w…ôn atu ¶in-w…ônaj a mińß ¶a a ¶udad mazuńß…ômaj a tipus sanaj. "musakamu pasubana Ē~ ° tu ¶udad" ŇčaŇčan "mkińß ¶a, masuńß…ôm ku tipus. makaj masuńß…ôm ku tipus. jadańß ku nir~…ĺaŇč…ô ¶." mar~…ĺukaj a kujumi nu ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan tu zazikuzaj a d…ômiad "sabaw tusa a bur~…ĺan tabakiaj a bur~…ĺad tu ** a d…ômiad, adidi Ē~ °aj a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad", " ¶u-si ńßan" ¶u-si a r~…ĺabii mapur~…ĺuŇč amin ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj mar~…ĺabi tu siwga ¶ "mar~…ĺumanaj a kujumi ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan tu sazikuzaj a pukan",kar~…ĺabian tu mińß ¶a anuajaw izaw ku nipakir~…ĺa ¶ tu kar~…ĺisiw atu misar~…ĺabii "mupupu tu mińß ¶aan" a r~…ĺisin, tuŇčusaj makaj ajawaj a mińß ¶a tu sazikuzaj a d…ômiad mipupu katukuńß tu zuma a mińß ¶a tu saka ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kaliliman == kasadingsingan, pisiwgacean nu malukay a kuyumi, Cowng-kow a pisiwgacean, layak a pisiwgac, u kuyumi nu Cowng-kow "malukay a kuyumi" pisiwgacean, uyza Huwa a tademaw atu kitakit layak a cudad a lalangawan cacay a mihcaan u satabakiay lalay a lisin a demiad. . makay mintay a malingatu, Hwa-siya kalimulakan nu pisiwgac zuma akatukuh cacay a bulad sabaw lima a demiad yen-syaw zikuz kya malepun ku kawawa, zuma izaw ku milimulakay tu pisiwngacean tuwaca katukuh hamin nu cacay a bulad pahezek, milimulak a kawaw siwgac han ku ngangan, u misiwgac. ,Śļ¶ś≠≤Á≠Č. zikuz nu sin-hay-ke-min, cen-bu mikilu tu ziday a tatungus u malumanay a kuyum sumad han tu ke-li kuyumi. Hwa-sya a misiwgac atu Caw-syen a siwgac,Ye-na a siwgac, Liw-ciw a siwgac atua ayaw nu Min-ce-wi a siwgac Lipun a siwgac hatu malecad ku demiad, lisin nu Cang a kuyumi, Mung-ku a siwgac malecad ku demiad anca cacay a demiad anca cacay a bulad ku laed. u siwgac nu Cow-kow. skaadingsingan i 2023 a mihcaan mala makakadumay a kanatal a pihibangan a demiad, i 2024 a mihcaan "sadingsingan a lisin nu Cowng-kow u kalimulakan a lisin nu syakay" caay ku tungus nu nisubelidan a lalangawan a tuud nu tademaw. pakayni malumanay kuyumin siwgace uyni ku nipili' a pangangan yadah ku kamu a macaculi. Namakay 2010 a zidayan malingtu, zima a binawlan nu Amilika "micidek ku Han-i atu Ye-nan-i" micili i katuudy nu cen-bu micukaymas tu ngangan nu Cowng-kow a siwgac. zuma Amilika a cen-ce-cya pasayza micukaymas tu "Lunar New Year". ayza a mihcaan Taywan micukaymas tu "Lunar New Year" apakutay han tu "Chinese New Year", mahiniay a nipatahkal makaynah nu Cowng-kow-talu a sinsinbunan "namalilid nu Cowng-kow". namahiza sa ku kamu nu cen-bu nu Cowng-kow-talu zuma micukaymas tu mahiniay a "Lunar New Year". "Lunar New Year"šĺÜšĽ£śõŅ"Chinese New Year" "Lunar New Year"ÁöĄŤ™™ś≥ē. nakamuan a lalangawan ŤĶ∑śļźŚā≥Ť™™ siwgace a lisin namaycuwaay hakya caay tu kadayum a gingkiwan, nika hinisa ku zima lalekalan sa iing-sang a mihcaan sazikuzay nu mihcaan misalisin tu Di'tu, misalisin tu tuas a kawaw "misalisin tu piadup", nakamuan saayaway i yaw-sun izaw tu ku lisin nu sadingsingan a lisin. malukay a kuyum cacay a bulad malingatu tu cacay a mihcaan, cacay a bulad tu cacay a demiad palalecad i capi nu kasadingsingan. lisin a demiad tatenga' atu pakayniay malukay malilid ku kawaw, "al-ya a nikiluan, "tang-i-ye-cay, sya-ye-suy, sang-yeci, cow-ye-nyen." musakamu tu "mihca" a ngangan makay cow a ziday malingatu, cya-ku-wen atu cin-wenay a mihca a cudad mazuhemay a tipus sanay. "musakamu pasubana' tu cudad" ngangan "mkihca, masuhem ku tipus. makay masuhem ku tipus. yadah ku nilangec." malukay a kuyumi nu cacay a mihcaan tu zazikuzay a demiad "sabaw tusa a bulan tabakiay a bulad tu 30 a demiad, adidi'ay a bulad 29 a demiad", "cu-si han" cu-si a labii mapulung amin ku luma'ay malabi tu siwgac "malumanay a kuyumi cacay a mihcaan tu sazikuzay a pukan",kalabian tu mihca anuayaw izaw ku nipakilac tu kalisiw atu misalabii "mupupu tu mihcaan" a lisin, tungusay makay ayaway a mihca tu sazikuzay a demiad mipupu katukuh tu zuma a mihca tu sakacacay a demiad. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kar~…ĺir~…ĺiman == kasadiŇčsiŇčan, pisiwga ¶…ôan nu mar~…ĺukaj a kujumi, ¶owŇč-kow a pisiwga ¶…ôan, r~…ĺajak a pisiwga ¶, u kujumi nu ¶owŇč-kow "mar~…ĺukaj a kujumi" pisiwga ¶…ôan, ujza ńßuwa a tad…ômaw atu kitakit r~…ĺajak a ¶udad a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan u satabakiaj r~…ĺar~…ĺaj a r~…ĺisin a d…ômiad. . makaj mintaj a mar~…ĺiŇčatu, ńßwa-sija kar~…ĺimur~…ĺakan nu pisiwga ¶ zuma akatukuńß ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad sabaw r~…ĺima a d…ômiad j…ôn-sjaw zikuz kja mar~…ĺ…ôpun ku kawawa, zuma izaw ku mir~…ĺimur~…ĺakaj tu pisiwŇča ¶…ôan tuwa ¶a katukuńß ńßamin nu ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad pańß…ôz…ôk, mir~…ĺimur~…ĺak a kawaw siwga ¶ ńßan ku ŇčaŇčan, u misiwga ¶. ,***. zikuz nu sin-ńßaj-k…ô-min, ¶…ôn-bu mikir~…ĺu tu zidaj a tatuŇčus u mar~…ĺumanaj a kujum sumad ńßan tu k…ô-r~…ĺi kujumi. ńßwa-sja a misiwga ¶ atu ¶aw-sj…ôn a siwga ¶,j…ô-na a siwga ¶, r~…ĺiw- ¶iw a siwga ¶ atua ajaw nu min- ¶…ô-wi a siwga ¶ r~…ĺipun a siwga ¶ ńßatu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku d…ômiad, r~…ĺisin nu ¶aŇč a kujumi, muŇč-ku a siwga ¶ mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku d…ômiad an ¶a ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad an ¶a ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad ku r~…ĺa…ôd. u siwga ¶ nu ¶ow-kow. skaadiŇčsiŇčan i **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa makakadumaj a kanatar~…ĺ a pińßibaŇčan a d…ômiad, i **** a mińß ¶aan "sadiŇčsiŇčan a r~…ĺisin nu ¶owŇč-kow u kar~…ĺimur~…ĺakan a r~…ĺisin nu sjakaj" ¶aaj ku tuŇčus nu nisub…ôr~…ĺidan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a tuud nu tad…ômaw. pakajni mar~…ĺumanaj kujumin siwga ¶…ô ujni ku nipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° a paŇčaŇčan jadańß ku kamu a ma ¶a ¶ur~…ĺi. namakaj **** a zidajan mar~…ĺiŇčtu, zima a binawr~…ĺan nu amir~…ĺika "mi ¶id…ôk ku ńßan-i atu j…ô-nan-i" mi ¶ir~…ĺi i katuudj nu ¶…ôn-bu mi ¶ukajmas tu ŇčaŇčan nu ¶owŇč-kow a siwga ¶. zuma amir~…ĺika a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô- ¶ja pasajza mi ¶ukajmas tu "r~…ĺunar n…ôw j…ôar". ajza a mińß ¶aan tajwan mi ¶ukajmas tu "r~…ĺunar n…ôw j…ôar" apakutaj ńßan tu " ¶ńßin…ôs…ô n…ôw j…ôar", mańßiniaj a nipatańßkar~…ĺ makajnańß nu ¶owŇč-kow-tar~…ĺu a sinsinbunan "namar~…ĺir~…ĺid nu ¶owŇč-kow". namańßiza sa ku kamu nu ¶…ôn-bu nu ¶owŇč-kow-tar~…ĺu zuma mi ¶ukajmas tu mańßiniaj a "r~…ĺunar n…ôw j…ôar". "r~…ĺunar n…ôw j…ôar"***" ¶ńßin…ôs…ô n…ôw j…ôar" "r~…ĺunar n…ôw j…ôar"***. nakamuan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan **** siwga ¶…ô a r~…ĺisin namaj ¶uwaaj ńßakja ¶aaj tu kadajum a giŇčkiwan, nika ńßinisa ku zima r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan sa iiŇč-saŇč a mińß ¶aan sazikuzaj nu mińß ¶aan misar~…ĺisin tu di Ē~ °tu, misar~…ĺisin tu tuas a kawaw "misar~…ĺisin tu piadup", nakamuan saajawaj i jaw-sun izaw tu ku r~…ĺisin nu sadiŇčsiŇčan a r~…ĺisin. mar~…ĺukaj a kujum ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan, ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad tu ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad i ¶api nu kasadiŇčsiŇčan. r~…ĺisin a d…ômiad tat…ôŇča Ē~ ° atu pakajniaj mar~…ĺukaj mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ku kawaw, "ar~…ĺ-ja a nikir~…ĺuan, "taŇč-i-j…ô- ¶aj, sja-j…ô-suj, saŇč-j…ô ¶i, ¶ow-j…ô-nj…ôn." musakamu tu "mińß ¶a" a ŇčaŇčan makaj ¶ow a zidaj mar~…ĺiŇčatu, ¶ja-ku-w…ôn atu ¶in-w…ônaj a mińß ¶a a ¶udad mazuńß…ômaj a tipus sanaj. "musakamu pasubana Ē~ ° tu ¶udad" ŇčaŇčan "mkińß ¶a, masuńß…ôm ku tipus. makaj masuńß…ôm ku tipus. jadańß ku nir~…ĺaŇč…ô ¶." mar~…ĺukaj a kujumi nu ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan tu zazikuzaj a d…ômiad "sabaw tusa a bur~…ĺan tabakiaj a bur~…ĺad tu ** a d…ômiad, adidi Ē~ °aj a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad", " ¶u-si ńßan" ¶u-si a r~…ĺabii mapur~…ĺuŇč amin ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj mar~…ĺabi tu siwga ¶ "mar~…ĺumanaj a kujumi ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan tu sazikuzaj a pukan",kar~…ĺabian tu mińß ¶a anuajaw izaw ku nipakir~…ĺa ¶ tu kar~…ĺisiw atu misar~…ĺabii "mupupu tu mińß ¶aan" a r~…ĺisin, tuŇčusaj makaj ajawaj a mińß ¶a tu sazikuzaj a d…ômiad mipupu katukuńß tu zuma a mińß ¶a tu saka ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
